Box Rate by Knight
L8 Forge Strategy: Max Heat vs Min Heat

At level 8, max heat gives a box chance (2.11%) but double-levels 62.6% of the time, skipping the high-value L9 roll. Min heat sacrifices the L8 box chance to guarantee landing on L9 (11.48% box rate). Shaded bands = 10th–90th percentile across 500 simulated sessions.

Theoretical Metrics (L8→L10 window)
Simulated 200-floor session — median boxes: Max heat 165 · Min heat 182
Floor Timing & Session Efficiency

I run the first floor of mission 9-2 Terminal Meltdown. I find it better than Sewer Stash because it's stratum 6 so payouts are higher, weapon damage scales up so lichens die in the same number of hits, and there's a chance for Love Puppies to spawn and drop True Love Lockets. I typically run the same level gear on all accounts and skip most enemies on the lower gear levels.
